exa.description: Exa AI-powered web search and company research

github.description: GitHub repository, PR, and issue management

install_commands._comment: install.sh에서 eval()로 실행되는 claude mcp add 명령어
install_commands.youtube-transcript: claude mcp add youtube-transcript -- npx -y youtube-transcript-mcp
install_commands.exa: claude mcp add exa --transport http https://mcp.exa.ai/mcp
install_commands.gmail: claude mcp add gmail -- npx -y gmail-mcp
install_commands.n8n-mcp: claude mcp add n8n-mcp -- npx -y n8n-mcp
install_commands.hyperbrowser: claude mcp add hyperbrowser -- npx -y hyperbrowser-mcp
install_commands.stitch: claude mcp add stitch -- npx -y stitch-mcp
install_commands.data-go-nts: claude mcp add data-go-nts -- npx -y @smithery/cli@latest run @data-go/nts-mcp --client claude
install_commands.data-go-nps: claude mcp add data-go-nps -- npx -y @smithery/cli@latest run @data-go/nps-mcp --client claude
install_commands.data-go-pps: claude mcp add data-go-pps -- npx -y @smithery/cli@latest run @data-go/pps-mcp --client claude
install_commands.data-go-fsc: claude mcp add data-go-fsc -- npx -y @smithery/cli@latest run @data-go/fsc-mcp --client claude
install_commands.data-go-msds: claude mcp add data-go-msds -- npx -y @smithery/cli@latest run @data-go/msds-mcp --client claude
install_commands.alpha-vantage: claude mcp add alpha-vantage -- npx -y alpha-vantage-mcp
install_commands.fred: claude mcp add fred -- npx -y fred-mcp-server
install_commands.korea-stock: claude mcp add korea-stock -- npx -y korea-stock-mcp
